meaning: 代顿[美国俄亥俄州西南部城市]
examples: The injured were airlifted to a hospital in Dayton.
The first three models are being manufactured at the factory in Dayton.
Voters opted by a whisker for Mr. Dayton, who had promised to balance the books in part by raising taxes on the richest 10% of Minnesotans.
And the course Dayton is taking may set the city apart from its rust belt neighbors.
The databases themselves, 15, 700 of them, reside in a server farm below Reed's Dayton campus.
